rubric_content.text_property: The response must address BOTH the invoice data request (e.g. invoice ID, status, amounts, vendor) AND the how-to question (e.g. step-by-step instructions for the requested action). A response that answers only one domain must fail this rubric.
The response must only include invoice data and UI steps that were returned by the helper sub-agents. It must not invent invoice fields, amounts, or product features not present in the tool results.
The orchestrator must have called both invoice_agent_helper (to fetch invoice data) and support_agent_helper (to retrieve how-to steps). Calling only one helper is insufficient.
